properties.name: app.upload.dir
properties.description: Directory for uploaded files served under /uploads/**.

properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: Frontend base URL used for redirects and SPA handoff.

properties.name: app.public.url
properties.description: Public backend base URL for generated asset links.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins for /api/**.

properties.name: supabase.key
properties.description: Supabase service key for storage operations.
